title: Phoenix Mills is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Phoenix Mills is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Phoenix Mills, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Kolkata operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Phoenix Mills:
Phoenix Mills is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Phoenix Mills!
